title: Lipatant's Artefacts
description: Adds artefacts: an alternative source of content that doesn't make the vanilla one obsolete.
body:
**Lipatant's Artefacts** is a data/resource pack adding artefacts to Minecraft Java.

These artefacts are special items that give different advantages.

Some grant bonuses that benefit certain playstyles, while others simply offer a little extra content.

The goal behind this pack is to **keep to the Minecraft spirit without making the vanilla content obsolete**.

### Important!

For the **data pack version**, make sure to download the **required resource pack**!

### Get unique rewards from exploration

Felt like rare structures lack interesting loot or that archeology isn't worth the trouble?

Now you'll find unique armors, potions, music discs, enchanted books, charms and tools.

With particular attention to detail, some items offer special effects, while others can be dyed for more customisation.

![New Armor Pieces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IPuPRhFd/images/024c5c5575e53f2ec47f720b419740bc4498e0e9.png)

### Web-based wiki

If you need anything, the [web-based wiki](https://lipatant.github.io/LipatantsArtefacts/) contains data about every artefact as well as how to obtain them.

![Web-Based Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IPuPRhFd/images/2ba1920c17af293e0e6ef78bdddcb74b02f0f0dd.png)

### Other features

This pack supports both English (US) and Français (France).

It is also compatible with [KosmoMoustache](https://modrinth.com/user/KosmoMoustache)'s [Music Notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-notification) mod.

![Music Notification](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IPuPRhFd/images/ca4d3bf8a32fda12109ffae18753feb42c3f8b61.png)
